care.summary: Compact fruiting tomato producing clusters of sweet small tomatoes; needs sun and support.
care.water: Consistent moisture; water deeply 2-3 times per week
care.soil: Rich, well-drained loamy soil with compost
care.humidity: Average; good air circulation to prevent disease
care.fertilizer: Tomato feed every 2 weeks once fruiting begins
care.toxicity: Leaves and stems are toxic (solanine); fruit is safe
common_issues: Blossom end rot from calcium deficiency
tips: Use a cage or stake for support
Harvest when fully red and slightly soft
